questions.promptTemplate: Which of these umas do NOT have a dorm roommate?

entries: "If I became a shooting star and granted your wish, would you be happy?"
"Ooh! That cloud looks like a carrot! It looks so tasty! Wait for meee!"
"And I mean you too, Trainer! Don't hide your adoration! Where's your applause?! I'm waiting!"
"Ew! Quit staring, you perv! King Pervert!"
"Once I've left them behind, the world expands right in front of my eyes. It's just me... and scenery all my own."
"You'll be watching me, right? From your special place in my passenger seat!"
"Wait... Could it be these shops are disguising themselves and hiding from public eyes?"
"Yo, Happy New Year! Here's to another year of crankin' the throttle and leavin' everyone in the dust!"
"The thing is, I have nothing. Nothing. A pretty face, a dumb doll. That's me."
"There is no path before me, only in my wake."
"Haha! ♪ It feels like I'm dashing up the stairs to adulthood. ☆"
"You're okay with me stripping you of your human rights? Heh-heh-heh!"
"How could you resist? I am the librettist! I am the director! And I am the star!"
"I wanna become the best in Japan, so I need to grab that Derby Umamusume title!"
"If anything, you could say I'm even hungrier. But do you think you're the prey that can satisfy me?"
"My emotions rose beyond expected levels on that day as I returned to your side."
"Allow me to share with you the timetable we should follow for the next three years."
"One can't become the world's greatest entertainer without being prepared to fail trying!"
"Trainer! I'm crying, I'm sweating... All these fluids are pouring out of me! I can't believe it..."
"Cause I'll never let anyone steal my number one spot in your heart!"
"I do not know when my body will give out on me. Among the countless Umamusume who shine so bright, my star may very well burn out the fastest."
"Ugh, you're seriously so cringe when you get hyper-enthused like that, but... yeah."
"I know you're still shook from the race results, and honestly, mood. That was a major L. Like, XXL."
"You know, you're pretty good at begging when you put your mind to it."
